message:
✨ Auto-override DCO for bot PRs and auto-login on Netlify previews

- Add /override dco Prow command for bot PRs (Copilot, dependabot)
- Auto-login in demo mode on Netlify deploy previews
- Handle demo-token in refreshUser without API call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,13 +53,20 @@ jobs:
         env:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: |
+          PR_NUM="${{ steps.check_bot.outputs.pr_number }}"
           SHA="${{ github.event.check_run.head_sha }}"
+
+          # Method 1: Set GitHub status (for GitHub native checks)
           gh api repos/${{ github.repository }}/statuses/$SHA \
             -X POST \
             -f state=success \
             -f context=dco \
-            -f description="DCO automatically overridden for bot commits"
-          echo "DCO overridden for bot PR"
+            -f description="DCO automatically overridden for bot commits" || true
+
+          # Method 2: Post Prow override command (for Prow-managed repos)
+          gh pr comment "$PR_NUM" --repo "${{ github.repository }}" --body "/override dco"
+
+          echo "DCO overridden for bot PR #$PR_NUM"
 
   # Handle build failures on Copilot PRs
   handle-build-failure:
